card.title: Gut Health
card.description: A comprehensive blend formulated to support gut integrity, digestion, and microbiome balance. Featuring zinc carnosine, glutamine, quercetin, licorice root, and a targeted probiotic blend, Gut Health may help strengthen intestinal permeability, reduce occasional bloating, and modulate healthy immune and inflammatory responses where they start- in the gut.

benefits.title: Gut Lining Support
benefits.description: Formulated with ingredients like zinc carnosine and glutamine, often used to help maintain gut lining integrity.

benefits.title: Digestive & Microbiome Balance
benefits.description: Includes a blend of probiotics and herbs traditionally used to support digestive comfort and microbial diversity.

benefits.title: Gut–Immune Connection
benefits.description: Highlights the relationship between gut integrity and immune system communication throughout the body.

splitContent.title: Trust Your Gut—It Knows What You Need
splitContent.subTitle: Gut Health supports digestion, microbiome balance, and the foundation of your well-being—starting from the inside out.
features: Encourages microbial balance in the gut
Provides nutrients that help maintain gut lining integrity
Supports natural immune defenses through gut health
Formulated to promote overall digestive comfort

quotes.quote: “Their supplements are natural, effective, and affordable. Since incorporating these products into my routine, I’ve noticed a significant improvement in my energy levels, skin appearance, and overall well-being.”
quotes.author: Jessica G.

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What is the best way and time to take Gut Health?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: Can I take Gut Health with other supplements or medications?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: Can I see the testing for purity, heavy metals, or the Certificate of Analysis (COA) for this product?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: What can I expect from Joi + Blokes?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
